form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 0.8 lengths at this track over 400m (23.69) beating Ash's Coin in Maiden on April 2. Key chance again.

form.formComment: Could only manage fifth last time but the start prior hit the frame at double figure odds when second (23.29) over 400m at this track. Aided by a low draw and is in the mix.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running and set it up early clocking 22.97 with a 4 length win at this track over 400m. Solid beginner who will be tough to beat with any luck from the tricky draw.

form.formComment: Didn't finish two back and couldn't make the frame last time when she finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 2 over 400m at this track behind Savina beaten 13 lengths (23.92). Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

form.formComment: Fast starter. Last start finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 4 over 400m at this track behind More Rain beaten 15 lengths (23.90). Has been racing well. Well placed here and looks a leading contender.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Richmond Straight to win by 0.8 lengths in 18.04, beating Supreme Twist. Last start finished last over 324m at Richmond Straight beaten 5.5 lengths (18.05) behind Noir in a Grade 5 on April 2. Others hold stronger claims.
